act_1_elite.label: Act 1 Elite
common_causes: Taking elites without enough front-loaded damage
Playing skills against Gremlin Nob
Not using Lagavulin's sleep turns for scaling setup
No AoE against Sentry Trio

act_1_boss.label: Act 1 Boss
common_causes: Insufficient front-loaded damage for Slime Boss split
Attacking into Guardian's thorns with multi-hit cards
Overhealing before Hexaghost (higher HP = more Inferno damage)

act_2_elite.label: Act 2 Elite
common_causes: No Disarm / Weak against Book of Stabbing's multi-hit scaling
Killing all minions against Gremlin Leader (triggers Strength buff)
Insufficient AoE and front-loaded block

act_2_boss.label: Act 2 Boss
common_causes: Deck too thin against Bronze Automaton (card steal)
Letting torch-head minions stack Mega Debuff against Collector
Using debuffs before The Champ's half-HP threshold (they get cleansed)

act_3_elite.label: Act 3 Elite
common_causes: Wasting damage on Intangible turns against Nemesis
Insufficient scaling against Giant Head (ramps up)
Not killing daggers fast enough against Reptomancer

act_3_boss.label: Act 3 Boss
common_causes: Card spam decks against Time Eater (12-card turn limit)
Power spam in phase 1 against Awakened One (gives boss Strength)
Not focus-firing Donu first against Donu and Deca

heart.label: The Heart
common_causes: Card spam triggering Beat of Death too many times per turn
Can't output 800+ damage through Invincible cap
Insufficient block engine for multi-hit attack on turns 2-3
No Intangible or max HP buffer

hallway.label: Hallway Fight
common_causes: Deck too weak for the floor reached
Bad draw order with no card draw to fix it
Too many basic Strikes/Defends diluting the deck

low_block.label: Low Block
low_block.description: Deck does not produce enough block to survive enemy attacks.
low_block.threshold: Block cards below 22% of total deck
low_block.fix: Add 2-3 block cards. Prioritize upgrading key block cards at campfires.

low_damage.label: Low Damage
low_damage.description: Deck cannot kill enemies before they scale out of control.
low_damage.threshold: No scaling damage cards by Act 2
low_damage.fix: Pick damage-scaling cards (Strength, Poison, Focus, Divinity) and front-loaded damage for early game.

poor_scaling.label: Poor Scaling
poor_scaling.description: Deck lacks cards that grow in power over the course of a fight.
poor_scaling.threshold: Fewer than 2 scaling cards by Act 2, or fewer than 3 by Act 3
poor_scaling.fix: Add scaling cards. Demon Form / Noxious Fumes / Defragment / Mental Fortress — one per character.

bad_draw.label: Bad Card Draw
bad_draw.description: Deck is inconsistent because key cards appear too rarely.
bad_draw.threshold: Fewer than 2 unique draw sources in Act 2+
bad_draw.fix: Add card draw: Battle Trance, Acrobatics, Coolheaded, Cut Through Fate.

high_cost_deck.label: High-Cost Deck
high_cost_deck.description: Too many 2+ cost cards without an energy relic to support them.
high_cost_deck.threshold: Expensive cards above 30% of total deck with no energy relic
high_cost_deck.fix: Pick an energy relic at the next boss, or remove some 2-cost cards.

risky_pathing.label: Risky Pathing
risky_pathing.description: Path choices took too many elites or skipped needed campfires.
risky_pathing.threshold: More than 3 elites per act, or consecutive elites without resting
risky_pathing.fix: Take 1-2 elites max per act. Use campfires for upgrades instead of healing.

deck_bloat.label: Deck Bloat
deck_bloat.description: Deck is too large; key cards appear too infrequently.
deck_bloat.fix: Skip card rewards more often. Remove basic Strikes/Defends at shops.

relic_mismatch.label: Relic Mismatch
relic_mismatch.description: Relics don't support the deck's game plan.
relic_mismatch.threshold: Scaling cards present but no scaling-support relics
relic_mismatch.fix: Take elites for relic rewards. Visit shops for synergistic relics.

relatedKnowledge: Ironclad starts with Bash and Defend — upgrade Bash early for Vulnerable burst.
Shrug It Off and Flame Barrier are premium Act 1 block pickups.
Gremlin Nob punishes skills — block cards are skills. Bring attacks instead.
Feel No Pain converts exhaust to block — strong against Sentry Trio's Dazed.
Ironclad needs front-loaded damage for Act 1 elites: Carnage, Hemokinesis, Anger.
Bash applies Vulnerable (50% more damage) — use it on turn 1 of elite fights.
Against Lagavulin: use 3 sleep turns to play Demon Form or Spot Weakness.
Akabeko relic doubles first attack each combat — great for elite bursting.
Demon Form is Ironclad's strongest universal scaler — play it early in boss fights.
Limit Break doubles current Strength. Timing is key — play it after Strength sources.
Spot Weakness gives +4(6) Strength if used when enemy intends to attack.
The Champ cleanses debuffs at half HP — hold debuffs and burst in one cycle.
Time Eater caps 12 cards/turn — prioritize card QUALITY over quantity.
1 Demon Form is worth more than 12 small attacks against Time Eater.
Awakened One gains +1 Strength per power played in phase 1 — delay powers to phase 2.
Donu and Deca: kill Donu first. Deca alone with block is manageable.
The Silent struggles with Act 1 elites due to low front-loaded damage.
Blade Dance and Dagger Throw provide early damage output.
Poison is slow for elites — mix in direct damage until deck stabilizes.
Gremlin Nob punishes Silent very hard (skill-heavy starter deck). Bring attacks and potions.
Survivor and Neutralize are strong starter defends — upgrade Neutralize for 2-turn Weak.
Dodge and Roll + Blur provide layered block for boss fights.
Slime Boss: save burst damage for the split turn. Small slimes must die fast.
Hexaghost: DON'T overheal before the fight — Inferno damage scales with your current HP.
Noxious Fumes + Catalyst = exponential poison scaling for boss fights.
Footwork provides permanent Dexterity — the Silent's best scaling defense.
Well-Laid Plans lets you hold key cards for the right turn — essential for boss fights.
The Collector: kill torch-head minions fast. AoE poison (Crippling Cloud) hits everything.
The Heart's Beat of Death punishes every card play — high-impact > card spam.
After Image generates 1 block per card played, largely negating Beat of Death.
Wraith Form's Intangible negates the massive multi-hit attack on turns 2-3.
Acrobatics + Tactician engine cycles your deck to find key cards every turn.
Defect starts with Zap and Dualcast — upgrade Zap early for 0-cost orb generation.
Ball Lightning and Cold Snap are efficient Act 1 picks that channel orbs.
Sunder carries Act 1 elite fights with high front-loaded damage.
Gremlin Nob: DON'T play Zap/Coolheaded (skills). Rely on Dualcast and Sunder.
Defragment is the Defect's best scaling card — stack 2-3 copies if possible.
Glacier provides massive block + 2 Frost orbs — essential for boss survival.
Biased Cognition + Core Surge (artifact) negates the Focus loss — permanent +4(5) Focus.
Echo Form doubles your first card each turn — the Defect's ultimate scaling power.
Defect has expensive power cards (Echo Form 3, Creative AI 3, Electrodynamics 2).
Without energy relic, 3-cost cards leave no energy for block.
Awakened One punishes Defect's power-heavy nature hard — delay powers to phase 2.
Mummified Hand turns powers into energy generators — each power makes next card free.
Frost orbs + Focus = passive block every turn — the Heart's Beat of Death becomes negligible.
6 Frost orbs × 5 Focus = 42 passive block per turn. The goal to aim for.
Capacitor increases orb slots — essential for reaching 6+ orbs.
Genetic Algorithm can scale to 40+ block for a single energy — use it early in the run.
Watcher's Wrath stance doubles damage — stay in Wrath as long as it's safe.
Eruption+ is the most important upgrade — it costs 0 instead of 2 energy to enter Wrath.
Empty Fist + exit Wrath = 28 damage for 1 energy. Premium Act 1 burst.
Against Gremlin Nob: Watcher can burst it down in Wrath before Nob enrages.
Mental Fortress scales block in Wrath — 4(6) block per stance change.
Talk to the Hand applies 2(3) block per hit — neutralizes multi-enemy fights.
Devotion enters Divinity (3x damage) every few turns — the Watcher's strongest scaling.
The Champ: burst from 50% to 0 in one Divinity turn. Scale silently before half HP.
Watcher's high burst damage encourages greedy pathing — but Wrath doubles damage taken too.
Time Eater caps Watcher's stance-dance combos at 12 cards — plan your end-turn carefully.
Every Wrath turn against Awakened One is dangerous — the boss gains Strength from powers.
Blasphemy (enter Divinity, die next turn) is win-or-die — only use on guaranteed kill turns.

boss_tips.Slime Boss: Save burst damage for the split turn. Small slimes must be cleared before they attack.
boss_tips.The Guardian: Scale during defensive phases. Do NOT attack into thorns with multi-hit cards.
boss_tips.Hexaghost: Counter-intuitive: DON'T heal before this fight. Lower HP = weaker Inferno.
boss_tips.Bronze Automaton: Draft extra cards. Losing your best card to steal hurts badly.
boss_tips.The Collector: Kill torch-heads FAST. Mega Debuff stacking is a death sentence.
boss_tips.The Champ: Don't use debuffs before half HP. Scale silently, then burst.
boss_tips.Time Eater: COUNT CARDS. Don't start a combo at card 9. High-impact > spam.
boss_tips.Awakened One: Hold powers for phase 2. Each power in phase 1 = +1 Strength for boss.
boss_tips.Donu and Deca: Focus Donu first. Corpse Explosion (Silent) = instant win.
boss_tips.Corrupt Heart: Need 800+ damage + Beat of Death defense. Intangible for big attacks.
